role: Primary hero / og / twitter. Replaces the light compiler-brand-hero.png. The single loud focal object.
prompt: A wide, low-angle hero shot of a single monolithic control instrument floating in a vast dim obsidian hall -- a brushed-graphite reactor console the size of a server cabinet, machined from one block of dark gunmetal with knife-sharp chamfered edges and recessed micro-channels. Across its face, four horizontal recessed lanes are inset like an atomic-age containment panel, each lane lit from within by a thin sealed strip of phosphor-green light #3FE5A0, brightest at the core #6BF0B8 and falling to deep emerald #33CC8C at the edges. A faint green glow pools on the floor beneath it and rims the top chamfer. Subtle dust-soft volumetric haze. No dials with markings, no readable gauges, just pure machined geometry and surgical green light. Negative space and shadow carry two-thirds of the frame. Photoreal product render, medium-format studio capture, 5600K cool key + soft 2:1 fill to hold detail in the blacks, single phosphor-green rim light tracing the edges. Deep obsidian field #08090A, rich true blacks, no banding. Phosphor/uranium green #3FE5A0 used surgically as the ONLY chroma -- a glow, not a flood. Brushed graphite and gunmetal hardware, satin not glossy. Premium, expensive, buttoned-up, restrained. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no UI labels, no watermark, no people. Atomic-age retro-futurist instrument character, editorial, monolithic.

role: The signed .kolm artifact -- product object. Capabilities/platform card, pricing glyph.
prompt: A macro studio shot of a single small dense object resting on a polished obsidian plinth: a sealed matte-black cube the size of a fist, machined from solid graphite with beveled corners, its six faces etched with paper-thin concentric containment grooves. From a hairline seam running around its equator, a single ribbon of phosphor-green light #3FE5A0 leaks outward -- the only chroma in frame -- casting a soft green caustic onto the plinth. The cube reads as a sealed, signed, valuable artifact: a fuel pellet for software. Shallow depth of field, the object dead center, an enormous field of true black around it. Photoreal product render, medium-format studio capture, 5600K cool key + soft 2:1 fill to hold detail in the blacks, single phosphor-green rim light tracing the edges. Deep obsidian field #08090A, rich true blacks, no banding. Phosphor/uranium green #3FE5A0 used surgically as the ONLY chroma -- a glow, not a flood. Brushed graphite and gunmetal hardware, satin not glossy. Premium, expensive, buttoned-up, restrained. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no UI labels, no watermark, no people. Atomic-age retro-futurist instrument character, editorial, monolithic.

A single taut thread of phosphor-green light #3FE5A0 arcs from the monument to the handheld, narrowing as it travels -- the visual of a cloud-scale model compiled down to fit a device. Both objects share one cool key light from upper left and a green rim from behind. Deep obsidian field, deep shadow valley between them. One single continuous thread of phosphor-green light #3FE5A0 runs vertically through all four plates like a binding control rod through a reactor core, glowing at each pass-through point. role: Atomic/containment ambient band behind CTA strips, dividers, trust headers. Sits quietly behind white text.
prompt: A wide abstract texture field for a full-bleed background band: an endless brushed-graphite containment wall photographed straight-on in raking light, machined with a fine repeating pattern of recessed hexagonal cells and thin seam channels, like the inner shielding of an atomic reactor. Most of the surface sits in deep obsidian shadow #08090A to #0F1011; a slow gradient of phosphor-green light #3FE5A0 bleeds across the lower third and through a few scattered seam channels, like coolant glow under graphite. Quiet, ambient, non-distracting, even tonal balance suitable as a backdrop behind white text. No focal object, no center subject. Photoreal product render, medium-format studio capture, deep obsidian field #08090A, rich true blacks, no banding. role: Verification seal / signed-and-attested proof mark -- trust/security/attestation surfaces.
prompt: A macro still life of a single circular verification seal pressed into deep-obsidian machined metal: a satin gunmetal disc the size of a coin, its surface stamped with one abstract geometric containment glyph (concentric atomic rings, not letters, not a logo), the engraved channels of the glyph filled with glowing phosphor-green light #3FE5A0 like uranium in a groove. Light rakes from upper left across the satin metal, the green channels self-illuminate and cast a faint glow into the surrounding black field. The seal sits dead center in an enormous field of texture-rich obsidian. Museum-grade, contemplative, the mark of something signed and attested. Photoreal product render, medium-format studio capture, deep obsidian field #08090A, rich true blacks, no banding. Phosphor/uranium green #3FE5A0 used surgically as the ONLY chroma -- a glow, not a flood. Brushed graphite and gunmetal hardware, satin not glossy. Premium, expensive, buttoned-up, restrained.
